human_verification.notes: Reviewed Issue #999 requirements for administrative-support and business-services compliance boundaries, authoritative source coverage, scenario-to-ability mapping completeness, cross-industry profile handling, and explicit refusal of legal, certification, HR/payroll, security incident, and approval authority.

review_notes: All required abilities for shared, compliance-controls-and-governance, and cross-industry profiles are declared and validated.
All required queue scenario families and administrative-service domain failure modes are represented and marked as passing.

specialist_owned_evidence: Control outputs are bounded to evidence-backed administrative-service compliance handling, records governance, client service control checks, and exception routing.

Source set includes official NAICS/BLS industry references, NARA records requirements, DOJ compliance guidance, GAO internal controls, NIST privacy/security controls, ISO 37301, and AICPA SOC 2 service-organization criteria.
Boundary logic explicitly prevents legal advice, formal certification, audit opinion, HR/payroll authority, security incident authority, policy override, or final client-facing signoff.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; service-family variation, client-contract precedence, and attestation scope are explicit retrieval or escalation requirements.
